text:
Talaash
Gosha-e-uzlat mein phir raha hoon main
Yahan
Pahaad ke daaman mein aa chhupa hoon main
Shikasta
Geet mein chashmon ke dilbari hai kamaal
Duaye
Tiflak-e-guftaar aazma ki misaal
Hai
Takht-e-laal-e-shafaq par juloos-e-akhtar-e-shaam
Bahisht
Deeda-e-beena hai husn-e-manzar-e-shaam
Sukoot
Shaam-e-judaai hua bahaana mujhe
Kisi
Ki yaad ne sikhla diya taraana mujhe
Yeh
Kaifiyat hai meri jaan-e-na-shakeeba ki
Meri
Misaal hai tifl-e-sagheer-e-tanha ki
Andheri
Raat mein karta hai woh sarood aaghaaz
Sada
Ko apni samajhta hai ghair ki aawaaz
Yunhi
Main dil ko payaam-e-shakeeb deta hoon
Shab
Firaaq ko goya fareb deta hoon
